_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The analyst's higher-trust read and diverging factor evidence point to a slow grind up from Anxiety into Complacency as the market stabilizes post-recovery, but conviction stays low because the narrative's accumulation thesis remains unconfirmed by momentum alignment.
next_move.brains_agree: Partial — both call direction UP, but analyst sees it as low-conviction drift into Complacency while narrative writer sees higher-conviction recovery rally setup; the split is on conviction level and structural interpretation of the divergences
